# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 with performance wins** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews Skia m151 with zero-allocation improvements across text, shaping, and color APIs. It syncs the bundled renderer to Chrome milestone 151 (including upstream bug fixes), adds ReadOnlySpan overloads for color parsing, eliminates per-call allocations in HarfBuzz and SKShaper paths, and extends WebAssembly support to .NET 11 via Emscripten 5.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151, giving consumers the latest upstream engine while preserving SkiaSharp's managed API surface. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Three rounds of upstream Chrome/m151 fixes folded in, keeping the bundled engine current with the latest stability and correctness patches from Google. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))
- **WebAssembly build warnings removed** — Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer report macro redefinition noise. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads and faster hex parsing** — Hex color parsing is rewritten for speed and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, letting callers parse color strings without allocating a substring. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **Allocation-free shaping and tag-parsing paths** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8, HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse, SKFourByteTag.Parse, and SKShaper glyph-result reads are all reworked to avoid per-call heap allocations, using pooled encoding, stack buffers, or zero-copy spans. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — Removes a stray unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions that was not needed, cleaning up safe-context usage in consumer code. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A native handle was not released when SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was called with a region argument, causing a small leak per decoded image. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Platform

- **WebAssembly support extended to .NET 11 via Emscripten 5** — Adds Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries so SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp can target .NET 11 WASM builds alongside the existing .NET 8/9/10 assets. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 gains allocation-free UTF-8 encoding (pooled encode) and tag parsing (stack buffer), and adds Emscripten 5.0.6 native libraries for WebAssembly on .NET 11.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Removed the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule to silence Emscripten build warnings, and added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly support ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 added allocation-free shaping and color APIs, three rounds of upstream m151 bug fixes, Emscripten 5 support for .NET 11 WebAssembly, and fixed the SKImage native resource leak.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly Skia build cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
